name: Women's Oversized Cateye Tortoise Shell Butterfly Sunglasses - A New Day™ Assorted Browns: UV Protection, Recycled Frame
description:
Rock a chic style when you step out into the sun with a pair of Oversized Cateye Tortoise Shell Butterfly Sunglasses from A New Day™. These plastic butterfly sunglasses will elevate your look with the tortoiseshell frames and gray lenses, and the stylish oversized cat-eye silhouette looks great with casual and dressier ensembles. Plus, UV protection helps keep your eyes safe from the sun, making these glasses an instant favorite in your accessory collection.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
